The '''Civilian Protection Guild''' was a small group of [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] who dedicated their time to the protection of the citizens of that [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Civilian Protection Guild appeared in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Star Wars video games|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
